commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Go into a chamber This happened when he heard the king was slain, and justly apprehended that he should be punished for his false prophecy; (Challoner) though this be nowhere recorded, (Calmet) except in Josephus. (Worthington)
He probably escaped death. (Salien)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Go into a chamber: This happened when he heard the king was slain, and justly apprehended that he should be punished for his false prophecy.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
